name: The Coffee Badge
effect: Badge in. Acquire beverage. Badge out. This card is considered present.

clauses.name: VISIBILITY CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the badge log records entry: Attendance is considered fulfilled.

clauses.name: COLLABORATION EFFECT
clauses.rule: If a colleague is briefly encountered in the kitchen: The interaction is considered a touchpoint.

clauses.name: RETURN-TO-OFFICE PROTECTION
clauses.rule: When compliance metrics are reviewed: This card cannot be flagged as absent.

witness_quote: I saw them this morning, definitely.
